stemHtml:
Refer to figure.
An operator is tasked to operate other-than-complex aircraft in mountainour terrain. The aircraft is however not equipped with supplemental oxygen for persons onboard. The operation is approved under SPO.OP.195, and the operator must adhere to specific altitude restrictions. For this task, the operator must not fly...

options.a: Above 13 001 feet, with time spent above 10 000 feet limited to a maximum of 10 minutes.
options.c: Above 13 001 feet, with time spent above 10 000 feet limited to a maximum of 30 minutes.
